blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 586 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
